text.tspan: What happens now, why preview artifacts exist, where visual compare loops, and what the clean mental
Color code: blue = user/input purple = orchestration green = real app/durable
output yellow = compare/decision red = failure/confusion teal = storage/cache
Key idea: preview exists to help
Mental model: User asks -> worker orchestrates -> Codex builds real app -> visual compare
finds mismatch -> Codex revises -> worker verifies and delivers.
